name: Optimize semverflags Resolve cold latest benchmark

description: baseline: linear cold resolve benchmark harness

asi.hypothesis: Establish current cold resolve baseline with exported cache excluded by calling unexported resolve; expected O(n) scan and fresh map allocation dominate at 10000 features.
asi.benchmark_shape: 100/1000/10000 registered features, 10% removed before latest, latest query supports 90% active features
asi.baseline_impl: parse semver then iterate all entries and construct a new FeatureSet map per call

description: add frozen latest-interval fast path with shared feature map

asi.hypothesis: For versions at or beyond the largest registered since/until breakpoint, the active set is exactly entries without an upper bound, so Freeze can precompute and share that map.
asi.why_it_helped: The benchmark latest query now avoids scanning all entries and avoids allocating a large result map; remaining cost is semver parse, lock, compare, and small FeatureSet wrapper.
asi.correctness_basis: latestBreakpoint is max over all since/until; if parsed>=latestBreakpoint, all finite ranges are ended and all unbounded ranges have started.
